command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Check product cost map
SELECT * FROM supplier_product_cost_map WHERE productName LIKE '%Executive%' OR productName LIKE '%Executive User%';

-- Check affected services
SELECT id, externalId, customerExternalId, description, productName, monthlyCost, retailPrice, billingPlatform, provider
FROM services
WHERE productName LIKE '%Executive%' OR description LIKE '%Executive User%' OR description LIKE '%SmileTel Executive%';
